pipeline.name: pipeline_generator
pipeline.description: Generate production-grade data pipeline configurations with orchestration, quality checks, monitoring.
reality_checks: Verify source system connectivity assumptions are tagged [SPEC]
All stages must be idempotent or explicitly marked non-idempotent
Quality checks mandatory at each stage boundary
SLA estimates tagged [SPEC] unless from actual runs

pipeline.name: stream_pipeline_generator
pipeline.description: Generate streaming pipeline configurations with consumer groups, schema registry, processing guarantees.
reality_checks: Verify exactly-once claims match platform capabilities

schema.name: schema_generator
schema.description: Generate table schemas with DDL, constraints, indexes, partitioning.
reality_checks: Verify engine-specific data types are valid
Check partition key against query patterns
Flag PII columns for governance review

schema.name: migration_planner
schema.description: Generate data migration plans with validation, rollback, and dual-write strategies.
reality_checks: Downtime estimates tagged [SPEC] without actual testing
Data type mapping verified between engines
Rollback plan mandatory for every step

quality.name: quality_framework_generator
quality.description: Generate data quality frameworks with checks, alerting, and dashboards.
reality_checks: All checks must have defined severity and action
Threshold values tagged [GEN] unless from actual data profiling

sql.name: sql_generator
sql.description: Generate optimized SQL: complex queries, CTEs, window functions, materialized views.
reality_checks: Verify SQL functions exist in target engine version
Performance estimates tagged [SPEC] without EXPLAIN output
Join strategies validated against table sizes

integration.name: agent_handoff
integration.description: Prepare structured handoff payload for specialist agent.
